stories.title: Scaling Customer Support During Peak Sales

persona.name: Support Manager
painPoints: Support volume spiked 300% during sales events
Agent overtime costs were unsustainable
Customer satisfaction dropped to 75%
High agent turnover due to stress

scenario.background: Sarah manages support for a platform with 5M monthly active users. During Black Friday, ticket volume surged from 2,000 to 8,000+ daily.
scenario.goal: Maintain response times and CSAT without hiring 50 temporary agents
scenario.action: Deployed Kira AI-Native Livechat with AI seats handling common inquiries, smart routing for complex issues
scenario.result: AI resolved 60% of inquiries automatically. Complex tickets included full context for agents. Response time improved from 5 min to 30 seconds.

quote.content: Kira transformed our peak season operations. We handled 3x volume without adding headcount, and our team actually had better work-life balance.
quote.author: Sarah Chen

stories.title: Global Sales with Local Language Support

persona.name: Sales Director
painPoints: Customers in 8 countries, language barriers
Maintaining 5 regional sales teams was expensive
Could not provide 24/7 coverage globally
Inconsistent messaging across regions

scenario.background: Michael's SaaS company serves enterprise clients across APAC, Europe, and Americas. Each region needed native language support for sales calls.
scenario.goal: Centralize sales operations while maintaining local language capabilities
scenario.action: Deployed Kira Voice AI with multi-language TTS and native-speaking agent personas
scenario.result: One team now handles global sales in 12 languages. Japanese clients specifically praised the natural-sounding voice quality.

quote.content: Our Japanese enterprise clients were amazed—they thought we had a dedicated Tokyo sales team. The voice quality is indistinguishable from native speakers.
quote.author: Michael Roberts

stories.title: Doubling Loan Conversion with AI Optimization

persona.name: Sales Director
painPoints: Outbound conversion rate only 2%, below industry average
No visibility into which scripts worked best
Top performers' techniques couldn't be replicated
A/B test results took weeks to analyze

scenario.background: David's 200-person sales team made 10,000 daily outbound calls for personal loans. Despite high volume, conversion rates lagged competitors.
scenario.goal: Increase conversion rates and systematize winning scripts
scenario.action: Implemented Kira Call Script Optimizer with A/B testing and multi-armed bandits for automatic optimization
scenario.result: Conversion improved from 2% to 4.5% in 90 days. AI identified 12 script improvements automatically.

quote.content: The Script Optimizer is like having a sales coach that never sleeps. New hire onboarding time dropped from 2 weeks to 3 days because the system guides them.
quote.author: David Park

persona.name: Operations Lead
painPoints: 500+ daily appointments needed confirmation calls
Manual calling consumed 3 hours of nurse time daily
15% no-show rate costing revenue
Patients often forgot appointments without reminders

scenario.background: A chain of 12 clinics struggled with appointment no-shows. Nurses spent valuable time on reminder calls instead of patient care.
scenario.goal: Automate appointment reminders while maintaining personal touch
scenario.action: Deployed Kira Voice Campaigns with conversational AI for appointment confirmations, rescheduling, and waitlist filling
scenario.result: No-shows dropped from 15% to 5%. Nurses reclaimed 3 hours daily for patient care.

quote.content: Patients actually prefer the AI reminders—they can reschedule immediately without being put on hold. Our nursing staff can focus on what they do best.
quote.author: Jennifer Walsh

stories.title: Zero-Code AI Agent Deployment for Retail

persona.name: IT Administrator
painPoints: Wanted AI customer service but lacked ML expertise
Previous AI projects took 6+ months to deploy
Concerned about hallucination and brand safety
Limited budget for custom development

scenario.background: A mid-size retail chain needed to scale customer support for 50+ stores but had no AI engineering team.
scenario.goal: Deploy professional AI agents without hiring ML engineers
scenario.action: Used Kira Agent Marketplace retail template with returns, tracking, and product recommendation skills
scenario.result: Deployed in 3 days with 20+ pre-built skills. 92% accuracy on first contact.

quote.content: We went from zero to production AI agents in 72 hours. The retail template understood our use cases out of the box—just needed our brand voice added.
quote.author: Carlos Mendez

stories.title: Unified WhatsApp Support for Global Customers

persona.name: Support Manager
painPoints: 80% of customers preferred WhatsApp
Support team switching between 4 different tools
Customer history fragmented across channels
Could not send order updates via WhatsApp

scenario.background: An e-commerce company selling to Latin America and Southeast Asia found most customers preferred WhatsApp over email.
scenario.goal: Centralize WhatsApp support with full customer context
scenario.action: Integrated Kira WhatsApp Business API with unified inbox and order status templates
scenario.result: Support efficiency improved 50%. Customer satisfaction increased 20%. First response time dropped 70%.

quote.content: Our customers are on WhatsApp all day. Now we meet them where they are. The template messages for order updates are a game-changer.
quote.author: Ana Rodriguez
